summary: Comprehensive audit hardening: timeouts, path resolver, strict schema/env checks, goraphdb retries, health check classification

details.timeouts: Added configurable timeout handling across model discovery and config loading
details.path_resolver: New path resolver module for strict path validation
details.schema_validation: Enhanced strict schema and environment variable validation
details.retry_logic: Improved retry logic for GoraphDB and GraphDB clients
details.health_check: Enhanced health check with provider classification
